div.style: font-family: 'Segoe UI', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif; display: flex; flex-direction: column; height: 100%; background: #ffffff; border-radius: 24px; box-shadow: 0 20px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); overflow: hidden; position: relative;
background: linear-gradient(135deg, #FF7E5F, #FEB47B); color: white; padding: 20px; text-align: center; font-size: 24px; font-weight: bold; letter-spacing: 2px;

div.div: 🛒 沉浸式中文对话 - 日常活动与学习

div.style: position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.95); z-index: 50; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; align-items: center; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 0.4s;
div.h1: 点击开始 / Click to Start

p.style: color: #555; font-size: 15px; margin-top: 15px; max-width: 80%; text-align: center;

div.p:
已启用“男女双声”及“自然语调拟真”引擎
请确保电脑扬声器已开启。

div.style: flex: 1; padding: 30px 40px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; text-align: center; overflow-y: auto;
display: inline-block; padding: 10px 30px; border-radius: 40px; font-size: 20px; font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 30px; transition: all 0.3s;
font-size: 34px; color: #d35400; margin-bottom: 20px; font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif; letter-spacing: 1px;
font-size: 22px; color: #7f8c8d; font-style: italic; background: #f8f9fa; padding: 15px 25px; border-radius: 15px; width: 85%;
padding: 20px 40px; background: #fdfdfd; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; border-top: 1px solid #eee;

button.style: padding: 15px 25px; font-size: 18px; font-weight: bold; cursor: pointer; border: none; background: #e0e0e0; color: #333; border-radius: 12px; transition: 0.2s;

padding: 18px 45px; font-size: 22px; font-weight: bold; cursor: pointer; border: none; background: #FF7E5F; color: white; border-radius: 40px; box-shadow: 0 8px 20px rgba(255, 126, 95, 0.4); transition: 0.2s;

padding: 15px 25px; font-size: 18px; font-weight: bold; cursor: pointer; border: none; background: #FF7E5F; color: white; border-radius: 12px; box-shadow: 0 5px 15px rgba(255, 126, 95, 0.3); transition: 0.2s;

div.style: height: 100%; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #FEB47B, #FF7E5F); width: 0%; transition: width 0.4s ease;
padding: 6px; text-align: center; font-size: 12px; color: #888; background: #f0f0f0;

div.div: 正在检测本地与在线双声语音引擎...
